MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PRESSE, LLC DBA CAFE DE LA PRESSE'S JOINT MOTION FOR 1)FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT 2) FINAL CERTIFICATION OF SETTLEMENT CLASS AND 3) ENTRY OF ORDER DISMISSING CLASS CLAIMS WITH PREJUDICE.

Appearances: Un Kei Wu and Arlo Garcia Uriarte of Liberation Law Group (415.695.1000) for plaintiff and moving party; Brian P. Maschler of Gordon & Rees LLP (415.986.5900) appearing via Court Call for defendant and responding party.

Discussed and the Court rules as follows: Granted. Counsel are directed to submit a proposed form of order for the Court's consideration via email. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/MJM)

Notice Of Application And Application For Attorney'S Fees And Costs And Named Plaintiff'S Enhancement Pursuant To The Class Action Settlemtn And Release
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CARLOS BONILLA'S APPLICATION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS AND NAMED PLAINTIFF'S ENHANCEMENT PURSUANT TO THE CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT

Appearances: Un Kei Wu and Arlo Garcia Uriarte of Liberation Law Group (415.695.1000) for plaintiff and moving party; Brian P. Maschler of Gordon & Rees LLP (415.986.5900) appearing via Court Call for defendant and responding party.

Discussed and the Court rules as follows: Granted. Counsel is directed to email a proposed form of order along with billing statements. These may also be submitted to the Court in hard copy form. The Court will make a final determination on costs upon review of the statements and proposed order. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/MJM)

Joint Motion For 1) Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement; 2) Prelim Certification Of Settlement Class; And 3) Approval Of Noice Of Class Action Lawsuit
Off Calendar May-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Arlo Garcia Uriarte, Esq. of the Liberation Law Group, Tel. 415.695.1000, for plaintiff;
Brian P. Maschler, Esq. of Gordon & Rees, LLP, Tel. 415.986.5900, for defendant, by Court Call.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, DEFENDANT PRESSE, LLC DBA CAFE DE LA PRESSE'S (Joint) Motion For 1) Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement; 2) Preliminary Certification Of Settlement Class; And 3) Approval Of Notice Of Class Action Lawsuit is granted. Mr. Uriarte shall prepare and submit the order with the revisions discussed in court. The final approval hearing is set for October 21, 2013 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Joint Motion For 1) Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement; 2) Prelim Certification Of Settlement Class; And 3) Approval Of Noice Of Class Action Lawsuit
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Continued To May-29-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ARLO URIARTE, ESQ., 415.695.1000, FOR PLAINTIFF CARLOS BONILLA.
BRIAN P. MASCHLER, ESQ., 415.986.5900, FOR DEFENDANT PRESSE, LLC DBA CAFE DE LA PRESSE.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. THE COURT CONTINUES HEARING ON DEFENDANT PRESSE, LLC DBA CAFE DE LA PRESSE'S Joint Motion For 1) Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement; 2) PrelimINARY Certification Of Settlement Class; And 3) Approval Of Noice Of Class Action Lawsuit TO MAY 29, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. COUNSEL TO FILE ADDITIONAL BRIEFINGS AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES TO D302 BY MAY 23, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Joint Motion For 1) Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement; 2) Prelim Certification Of Settlement Class; And 3) Approval Of Noice Of Class Action Lawsuit
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Apr-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PRESSE, LLC DBA CAFE DE LA PRESSE's Joint Motion For 1) Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement; 2) Preliminary Certification Of Settlement Class; And 3) Approval Of Noice Of Class Action Lawsuit is Continued to April 30, 2013 to give the moving party an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must immediately deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
